tagline: Pedal More. Play More. Feel Better.
elevator_pitch: CyclePet pairs an under-desk pedal exerciser with a Tamagotchi-style Chrome extension where your pedaling fuels a virtual pet's world. The harder you pedal, the sunnier the sky, the happier your pet, and the healthier you become during your workday.
problem: Millions of remote and office workers sit at their desks for 8+ hours a day, leading to a sedentary lifestyle that contributes to chronic health issues. Under-desk exercisers exist, but they are boring and easy to forget about. There is no motivation loop that keeps people pedaling consistently throughout the day.
solution: CyclePet connects a Bluetooth-enabled under-desk pedal exerciser to a browser-based virtual pet game. Your pedaling literally powers your pet's environment: sunshine, food growth, and happiness all depend on your movement. Stop pedaling and clouds roll in, rain starts, and your pet gets sad. It turns mindless desk exercise into a delightful, low-stakes game you never want to stop playing.
target_market: Remote workers, hybrid employees, and office professionals aged 25 to 45 who spend long hours at a desk and want a fun, unobtrusive way to stay active throughout the workday.
revenue_model: Hardware sales of the branded CyclePet under-desk pedal device ($149 to $199), plus a freemium Chrome extension with premium pet packs, environments, and seasonal content available through a $4.99/month subscription or one-time $2.99 expansion packs.
key_features: Bluetooth-connected under-desk elliptical that syncs pedal data to your browser in real time
Tamagotchi-style virtual pet Chrome extension where your pedaling controls weather, food, and happiness
Daily streaks, unlockable pets, and seasonal themed environments to keep engagement high
Productivity mode that converts pedal time into earned break-time credits for guilt-free screen breaks
competitive_advantage: Existing under-desk exercisers are hardware-only products with no engagement layer. CyclePet is the first to combine casual desk fitness with a charming virtual pet game loop, creating an emotional reason to keep pedaling that pure fitness tracking cannot match.
market_size_estimate: $2.4 billion. The global under-desk exercise equipment market is roughly $400M and growing, while the casual/hyper-casual gaming market exceeds $20B. CyclePet sits at the intersection; capturing even a small slice of desk-bound workers who game casually represents a multi-billion dollar addressable opportunity.
go_to_market: Launch on Kickstarter with a playful campaign video showing office workers bonding over their virtual pets. Seed early units to productivity YouTubers and work-from-home influencers. Follow up with direct-to-consumer sales through the CyclePet website and a free-tier Chrome extension to build viral word of mouth.
risks: Hardware manufacturing and logistics are capital-intensive and introduce supply chain risk for a startup
User novelty may wear off after the initial excitement, requiring constant content updates to retain engagement
Larger fitness brands like Peloton or Cubii could replicate the gamification layer and bundle it with superior hardware
year_one_milestones: Launch Kickstarter campaign and ship 5,000 units to early backers within 6 months
Release Chrome extension with 10 unlockable pets and 4 seasonal environments
Reach 15,000 active daily users and establish partnerships with 3 corporate wellness programs
